SELECT {fn MONTHNAME(event_date)} AS month_name FROM test_dates WHERE event_date >= {d '2020-01-01'} AND event_date <= {d '2022-12-31'};
SELECT event_date, {fn MONTHNAME(event_date)} FROM test_dates ORDER BY event_date;
SELECT COUNT(*), {fn MONTHNAME(event_date)} FROM test_dates GROUP BY {fn MONTHNAME(event_date)};
SELECT t1.event_date, t2.another_date, {fn MONTHNAME(t1.event_date)} AS month_name FROM test_dates t1 JOIN test_dates t2 ON t1.event_date < t2.event_date;
SELECT {fn MONTHNAME(dt)} FROM (SELECT event_date AS dt FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < {d '2022-01-01'}) AS sub;
CREATE TABLE events (event_date TIMESTAMP, event_name VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO events VALUES ({d '2021-01-15'}, 'New Year Celebration');
SELECT e.event_name, {fn MONTHNAME(e.event_date)} FROM events e WHERE {fn MONTHNAME(e.event_date)} = 'January';
SELECT e.event_name, {fn MONTHNAME(e.event_date)} FROM events e JOIN test_dates t ON {fn MONTHNAME(e.event_date)} = {fn MONTHNAME(t.event_date)};
